raw_consumer_statement:
Dispute No. : XXXX I'm a Citibank Credit Card XXXX and have been since I was XXXX XXXX XXXX ( now XXXX ). Never missed a payment and payoff the full amount every month. On or about XX/XX/year> I charged {$890.00} for airline tickets through Airreservation.com. After I made the charge I received a phone call from the company which requested some additional information, etc. After a while I felt something was off. I tried calling the company back and the number came up as " spam likely ''. I immediately went to Citibank XXXX and filed a dispute of the charges. 

Citibank then refunded me the {$890.00} but looked in the matter further. On XX/XX/year> Citibank sent a letter stating that they were giving the {$890.00} back to the company because I was going to received the airline tickets by the end of XXXX. 

The end of XXXX came and went and I didn't receive the tickets or my refund. I called Citibank and they opened another dispute. I also called the company and they sent me the following email.... Hi, I hope this message finds you well. 
I am writing to inform you that, due to overbooking, the airline has canceled your reservation. We are really sorry for the inconvenience. We would like to inform you that the refund has been successfully processed for the amount corresponding to the tickets you booked. We would like to confirm a full refund of {$890.00} USD will be processed to your original mode of payment. Please note that it may take between XXXX XXXX business days. for the refund to reflect in your account. 

Kindly verify the refund on your end, and feel free to reach out if you have any further questions or need assistance. Please do not hesitate to contact us at XXXX. We are here to help! 

Thank you for choosing us, and we hope to assist you again in the future. 

Thanks & Regards, Customer Experience Team Phone : XXXX I sent that email to my credit card company and they are refusing to refund my {$890.00} and so is the company. I'm at a loss since I've been disputing this for the past 4 months and have no tickets and no refund. 

Please tell me what I can do. Thank you and have a great day. 

Sincerely XXXX XXXX
